主要發現: 本週熱門研究主題: mortality (7篇), genetic testing (3篇), cardiovascular (3篇)
高影響力期刊發表 3 篇，包括: JAMA network open, Clinical and experimental pediatrics
高品質證據: 6 篇 RCT, 0 篇統合分析

重點文章.標題: Effects of induction-phase acute kidney injury and age at diagnosis on chronic kidney disease in pediatric acute lymphoblastic leukemia: a time-to-event cohort study.

PICO.O_結果: using the Cox proportional hazards model

重點文章.中文摘要:
【研究目的】本世代研究旨在探討To quantify the burden of AKI during induction and CKD in children with ALL, estimate CKD-free survival, and identify clinical predictors of CKD.

【研究方法】This retrospective cohort at a single university-affiliated tertiary center included patients aged 2-18 years with ALL who completed ≥3 months of follow-up.

【主要結果】Of 113 children (median age, 5.6; interquartile range [IQR], 3.8-9.4 years), AKI occurred during induction in 49 (43.4%). Leukemic kidney infiltration (LKI) was more frequently noted in patients with versus without AKI (P=0.01). Over 644 patient-years of follow-up (median, 5.1; IQR, 2.9-8.

【結論】AKI commonly developed during induction. An older age at diagnosis was the principal independent predictor of CKD development. The age effect demonstrated a linear risk gradient rather than a conventional dichotomous ≥10-year threshold. A LKI was associated with AKI and suggestive of subsequent CKD.

結構化摘要.背景: The survival rate of pediatric acute lymphoblastic leukemia (ALL) currently exceeds 90% in high-income settings, shifting the focus to its long-term effects. Kidney injury, acute kidney injury (AKI), and chronic kidney disease (CKD) are increasingly recognized associated conditions; however, the determinants of CKD in pediatric ALL remain poorly defined. PURPOSE: To quantify the burden of AKI during induction and CKD in children with ALL, estimate CKD-free survival, and identify clinical predict
結構化摘要.方法: This retrospective cohort at a single university-affiliated tertiary center included patients aged 2-18 years with ALL who completed ≥3 months of follow-up. AKI was classified by Kidney Disease: Improving Global Outcomes serum-creatinine criteria, while CKD was defined as a glomerular filtration rate <90 mL/min/1.73 m² for ≥3 months. CKD-free survival was estimated using the Kaplan-Meier method. Associations with time to CKD were assessed using the Cox proportional hazards model.
結構化摘要.結果: Of 113 children (median age, 5.6; interquartile range [IQR], 3.8-9.4 years), AKI occurred during induction in 49 (43.4%). Leukemic kidney infiltration (LKI) was more frequently noted in patients with versus without AKI (P=0.01). Over 644 patient-years of follow-up (median, 5.1; IQR, 2.9-8.3 years), 15 (13.3%) developed CKD (stage 2 [n=12], stage 3 [n=3]). The 1-, 3-, and 5-year CKD-free survival rates were 99.1%, 95.3%, and 94.1%, respectively. In multivariate models, age was independently assoc
結構化摘要.結論: AKI commonly developed during induction. An older age at diagnosis was the principal independent predictor of CKD development. The age effect demonstrated a linear risk gradient rather than a conventional dichotomous ≥10-year threshold. A LKI was associated with AKI and suggestive of subsequent CKD. These results suggest that older children may benefit from intensive kidney surveillance and supportive care. Multicenter prospective studies are warranted to refine the prevention strategies.

重點文章.標題: Genetic Testing for APOL1 in Adults With Hypertension: The GUARDD-US Randomized Clinical Trial.

PICO.P_族群: Hypertension: The GUARDD-US Randomized Clinical Trial
PICO.O_結果: S AND MEASURES: The primary outcome was change in SBP in individuals with APOL1 high-risk allelles at 3 months, assessed in a modified intention-to-treat analysis

重點文章.中文摘要:
【研究目的】本隨機對照試驗旨在探討To determine whether providing APOL1 high-risk genotype results to people with hypertension and their clinicians would reduce systolic BP (SBP) and improve CKD screening and diagnosis.

【主要結果】on blood pressure (BP) management and control. OBJECTIVE: To determine whether providing APOL1 high-risk genotype results to people with hypertension and their clinicians would reduce systolic BP (SBP) and improve CKD screening and diagnosis.

【結論】AND RELEVANCE: Provision of APOL1 genotype high-risk results to participants and clinicians was not associated with SBP reduction overall. Among the subset of patients with uncontrolled BP, the intervention group had a significant SBP reduction.

結構化摘要.目的: To determine whether providing APOL1 high-risk genotype
結構化摘要.結果: on blood pressure (BP) management and control. OBJECTIVE: To determine whether providing APOL1 high-risk genotype results to people with hypertension and their clinicians would reduce systolic BP (SBP) and improve CKD screening and diagnosis. DESIGN, SETTING, AND PARTICIPANTS: From July 1, 2020, to September 30, 2023, adults aged 18 to 70 years with hypertension and self-reported African ancestry were enrolled at 14 institutions and 54 clinical sites across the US. Eligible patients either (1) l
結構化摘要.結論: AND RELEVANCE: Provision of APOL1 genotype high-risk results to participants and clinicians was not associated with SBP reduction overall. Among the subset of patients with uncontrolled BP, the intervention group had a significant SBP reduction. APOL1 disclosure also increased the rate of CKD screening and diagnosis. Effects of reporting APOL1 genotype merit further investigation among those with uncontrolled BP. TRIAL REGISTRATION: ClinicalTrials.gov Identifier: NCT04191824.

PICO.I_介入: for non-clear cell renal cell carcinoma with tumor thrombus extension: a population-based cohort study
PICO.O_結果: predictive of all-cause mortality on multivariable Cox regression (hazard ratio (HR) = 1

重點文章.中文摘要:
【研究目的】本世代研究旨在探討To characterize the impact of histology on survival outcomes in a population-based cohort of patients treated surgically for renal cell carcinoma (RCC) with tumor thrombus (TT) extension.

【研究方法】The Surveillance, Epidemiology, and End

【主要結果】database was used to identify adult patients with node-negative, non-metastatic RCC and TT who underwent surgical resection between 2010 and 2021. The Kaplan-Meier method and log-rank test were used to compare overall survival (OS) probabilities for clear cell RCC (ccRCC) versus non-clear cell RCC (...

【結論】No statistically significant differences in survival outcomes by histology were detected among patients with TT arising from RCC after definitive surgical resection. Multimodal treatment strategies, particularly for nccRCC, are needed to further improve outcomes in these patients.

結構化摘要.結果: database was used to identify adult patients with node-negative, non-metastatic RCC and TT who underwent surgical resection between 2010 and 2021. The Kaplan-Meier method and log-rank test were used to compare overall survival (OS) probabilities for clear cell RCC (ccRCC) versus non-clear cell RCC (nccRCC). Cox and Fine-Gray competing risk regression analyses were performed to evaluate histology-specific risks of all-cause and cancer-specific mortality (CSM), respectively. RESULTS: A total of 65
結構化摘要.結論: No statistically significant differences in survival outcomes by histology were detected among patients with TT arising from RCC after definitive surgical resection. Multimodal treatment strategies, particularly for nccRCC, are needed to further improve outcomes in these patients.

重點文章.標題: Monogenic Etiologies of Kidney Cysts in the Pediatric Population: An Observational Cohort Study.
重點文章.期刊: Clinical journal of the American Society of Nephrology : CJASN

PICO.O_結果: s were diagnostic yield and distribution of pathogenic variants

重點文章.中文摘要:
【研究背景】Pediatric kidney cysts may indicate an underlying genetic disorder, yet the full spectrum of causes remains incompletely defined. With advances in genetic testing enabling broader evaluation, this study assessed the diagnostic utility of comprehensive genetic testing in a broad pediatric cohort with...

【研究方法】This observational cohort study included <18-year-olds enrolled between January 2020 and June 2024 at a single tertiary center. Genetic testing used targeted multi-gene or custom curated exome/genome sequencing panels, with segregation analysis when available.

【主要結果】Among 109 patients (median age 7.6 years, 53% female), genetic testing identified a definitive diagnosis in 81 of 100 tested patients (81%) from 72 families (79%; 14 disorders). PKD1 variants were most common (45%), while PKD2 accounted for 7%.

【結論】Comprehensive genetic testing in pediatric kidney cysts achieved high diagnostic yield in a selected cohort and identified diverse causes beyond major ADPKD/ARPKD genes, supporting early evaluation to improve diagnostic accuracy, inform prognosis, and guide management, even in the absence of family ...

結構化摘要.背景: Pediatric kidney cysts may indicate an underlying genetic disorder, yet the full spectrum of causes remains incompletely defined. With advances in genetic testing enabling broader evaluation, this study assessed the diagnostic utility of comprehensive genetic testing in a broad pediatric cohort with kidney cysts and characterized the underlying etiological diversity.
結構化摘要.方法: This observational cohort study included <18-year-olds enrolled between January 2020 and June 2024 at a single tertiary center. Genetic testing used targeted multi-gene or custom curated exome/genome sequencing panels, with segregation analysis when available. Eligible participants had at least two cysts without family history, one cyst with positive family history, or enlarged echogenic kidneys on prenatal ultrasound; those with congenital anomalies of the kidney and urinary tract associated wi
結構化摘要.結果: Among 109 patients (median age 7.6 years, 53% female), genetic testing identified a definitive diagnosis in 81 of 100 tested patients (81%) from 72 families (79%; 14 disorders). PKD1 variants were most common (45%), while PKD2 accounted for 7%. Other causes included HNF1B or 17q12 deletions (13%), minor ADPKD genes (11%; GANAB, NEK8, IFT140), monoallelic-PKHD1 (3%), and biallelic PKHD1 (8%), while syndromic ciliopathy genes accounted for 5%. A positive family history strongly correlated with a g
結構化摘要.結論: Comprehensive genetic testing in pediatric kidney cysts achieved high diagnostic yield in a selected cohort and identified diverse causes beyond major ADPKD/ARPKD genes, supporting early evaluation to improve diagnostic accuracy, inform prognosis, and guide management, even in the absence of family history.

重點文章.標題: Low concentration isotonic iodixanol on hepatic and portal veins imaging quality and renal function: A 320-detector CT dual-energy study.

PICO.I_介入: receive either iodixanol at 270 mgI/mL (iodixanol 270 group
PICO.O_結果: higher than those in the iodixanol 270 group (P <

重點文章.中文摘要:
【研究目的】本隨機對照試驗旨在探討ed to assess whether lower concentrations of iodixanol yield high-quality imaging by comparing hepatic and portal vein imaging quality and evaluating renal function following dual-energy CT (DECT) scans.

【研究方法】Patients were randomly assigned to receive either iodixanol at 270 mgI/mL (iodixanol 270 group, n = 50) or 320 mgI/mL (iodixanol 320 group, n = 50) and underwent DECT with energy-spectrum reconstruction.

【主要結果】Significant differences were observed in the contrast-to-noise ratio, signal-to-noise ratio of the main portal vein, and the computed tomography value of the hepatic vein between the 2 groups (P < .05). These parameters were superior in the iodixanol 320 group compared to the iodixanol 270 group.

【結論】With a fixed injection protocol, iodixanol 320 mgI/mL yielded higher venous enhancement, whereas iodixanol 270 mgI/mL provided diagnostically acceptable portal/hepatic venous image quality on DECT with a lower iodine load.

結構化摘要.背景: The effects of different concentrations of isotonic contrast agents on the quality of hepatic and portal vein imaging and their impact on patients' renal function remain unclear. This study aimed to assess whether lower concentrations of iodixanol yield high-quality imaging by comparing hepatic and portal vein imaging quality and evaluating renal function following dual-energy CT (DECT) scans.
結構化摘要.方法: Patients were randomly assigned to receive either iodixanol at 270 mgI/mL (iodixanol 270 group, n = 50) or 320 mgI/mL (iodixanol 320 group, n = 50) and underwent DECT with energy-spectrum reconstruction. Quantitative and qualitative image quality parameters, as well as changes in renal function before and after scanning, were compared between the 2 groups.
結構化摘要.結果: Significant differences were observed in the contrast-to-noise ratio, signal-to-noise ratio of the main portal vein, and the computed tomography value of the hepatic vein between the 2 groups (P < .05). These parameters were superior in the iodixanol 320 group compared to the iodixanol 270 group. Qualitative evaluation scores for the portal and hepatic veins in the iodixanol 320 group were significantly higher than those in the iodixanol 270 group (P < .05). Postcontrast acute kidney injury inci
結構化摘要.結論: With a fixed injection protocol, iodixanol 320 mgI/mL yielded higher venous enhancement, whereas iodixanol 270 mgI/mL provided diagnostically acceptable portal/hepatic venous image quality on DECT with a lower iodine load. After adjustment, 320 mgI/mL was associated with higher odds of postcontrast acute kidney injury; this safety signal requires confirmation in larger iodine-matched studies.

重點文章.標題: Endothelial activation and stress index (EASIX) as a predictor of acute kidney injury in patients undergoing transcatheter aortic valve replacement: A retrospective cohort study.

PICO.P_族群: 患有 Acute Kidney Injury 的病人
PICO.O_結果: with receiver operating characteristic analysis and multivariable logistic regression

重點文章.中文摘要: 【摘要】Transcatheter aortic valve replacement (TAVR) is being performed in increasingly complex, high-risk cohorts, and contrast-induced nephropathy (CIN) remains a major determinant of morbidity and mortality.

結構化摘要.完整摘要: Transcatheter aortic valve replacement (TAVR) is being performed in increasingly complex, high-risk cohorts, and contrast-induced nephropathy (CIN) remains a major determinant of morbidity and mortality. The endothelial-damage score EASIX (lactate dehydrogenase × creatinine/platelet count) is a validated prognostic index in hematology and critical care but has never been explored after TAVR. We retrospectively analyzed 130 consecutive severe AC patients (mean age 76.8 ± 8.4 years; 47.8% male) who underwent transfemoral TAVR (February 2019-March 2021). CIN was defined as a ≥25% or ≥0.5 mg/dL creatinine rise within 72 hours. The predictive value of EASIX was assessed with receiver operating characteristic analysis and multivariable logistic regression. CIN occurred in 15.4% (n = 20). Baseline EASIX was higher in CIN+ vs CIN- (2.92 ± 1.28 vs 1.33 ± 1.30; P < .001). An EASIX threshold ≥ 1.904 predicted CIN with 90.3% sensitivity and 86.2% specificity (area under the curve 0.91; P < .001).

重點文章.標題: Finerenone in Type 1 Diabetes and Chronic Kidney Disease.
重點文章.期刊: The New England journal of medicine

PICO.I_介入: receive finerenone (10 or 20 mg per day
PICO.O_結果: the relative change in the urinary albumin-to-creatinine ratio over a period of 6 months

重點文章.中文摘要:
【研究背景】The nonsteroidal mineralocorticoid receptor antagonist finerenone has been reported to improve kidney and cardiovascular outcomes in persons with type 2 diabetes and chronic kidney disease (CKD). The efficacy and safety of finerenone in persons with type 1 diabetes and CKD are unknown.

【研究方法】We conducted a phase 3 trial involving adults who had type 1 diabetes, CKD (estimated glomerular filtration rate [eGFR], 25 to <90 ml per minute per 1.73 m2 of body-surface area), and albuminuria (urinary albumin-to-creatinine ratio [with albumin measured in milligrams and creatinine measured in gra...

【主要結果】A total of 242 participants underwent randomization. The median urinary albumin-to-creatinine ratio decreased from 574.6 at baseline to 373.5 at 6 months among all the participants assigned to receive finerenone and from 506.4 to 475.6 among those assigned to receive placebo.

【結論】In adults with type 1 diabetes and CKD, finerenone resulted in a significantly greater decrease in the urinary albumin-to-creatinine ratio than placebo. (Funded by Bayer; FINE-ONE ClinicalTrials.gov number, NCT05901831.).

結構化摘要.背景: The nonsteroidal mineralocorticoid receptor antagonist finerenone has been reported to improve kidney and cardiovascular outcomes in persons with type 2 diabetes and chronic kidney disease (CKD). The efficacy and safety of finerenone in persons with type 1 diabetes and CKD are unknown.
結構化摘要.方法: We conducted a phase 3 trial involving adults who had type 1 diabetes, CKD (estimated glomerular filtration rate [eGFR], 25 to <90 ml per minute per 1.73 m2 of body-surface area), and albuminuria (urinary albumin-to-creatinine ratio [with albumin measured in milligrams and creatinine measured in grams], 200 to <5000) and were receiving an angiotensin-converting-enzyme (ACE) inhibitor or an angiotensin-receptor blocker. Participants were randomly assigned to receive finerenone (10 or 20 mg per da
結構化摘要.結果: A total of 242 participants underwent randomization. The median urinary albumin-to-creatinine ratio decreased from 574.6 at baseline to 373.5 at 6 months among all the participants assigned to receive finerenone and from 506.4 to 475.6 among those assigned to receive placebo. Over a period of 6 months, the urinary albumin-to-creatinine ratio decreased by 34% with finerenone (geometric mean ratio to baseline, 0.66; 95% confidence interval [CI], 0.60 to 0.73) and 12% with placebo (geometric mean r
結構化摘要.結論: In adults with type 1 diabetes and CKD, finerenone resulted in a significantly greater decrease in the urinary albumin-to-creatinine ratio than placebo. (Funded by Bayer; FINE-ONE ClinicalTrials.gov number, NCT05901831.).

重點文章.標題: Efficacy and safety of α1-adrenergic blockers after extracorporeal shock wave lithotripsy in pediatric kidney stones.

PICO.O_結果: s were stone-free rate (SFR) and stone expulsion time

重點文章.中文摘要:
【研究目的】本隨機對照試驗旨在探討The development of effective medical expulsive therapy (MET) following extracorporeal shock wave lithotripsy (ESWL) for pediatric urolithiasis is crucial for enhancing stone fragment clearance.

【研究方法】A prospective randomized comparative study was conducted involving 200 patients (aged 2-18 years) who underwent ESWL. Participants were allocated to a study group (n = 50, receiving α1-blockers: tamsulosin 0.

【主要結果】The odds of being stone-free were 2.11 times higher with α1-blocker therapy (OR = 2.11; 95% CI: 1.02-4.37). The median expulsion time was reduced from 7 [5-9] days in the control group to 5 [4-7] days in the study group (p = 0.010).

【結論】Adjunctive therapy with α1-blockers after ESWL in children with urolithiasis improves treatment efficacy, shortens stone expulsion time, reduces pain, and demonstrates a favorable safety profile. An optimal timeframe for efficacy assessment is 6 days post-ESWL.

結構化摘要.方法: A prospective randomized comparative study was conducted involving 200 patients (aged 2-18 years) who underwent ESWL. Participants were allocated to a study group (n = 50, receiving α1-blockers: tamsulosin 0.2 mg/day for ages 2-5, silodosin 4 mg/day for ages > 5) or a control group (n = 150, receiving standard therapy). Primary endpoints were stone-free rate (SFR) and stone expulsion time. Secondary endpoints included pain dynamics (visual analog scale, VAS), analgesic requirements, and adverse
結構化摘要.結果: The odds of being stone-free were 2.11 times higher with α1-blocker therapy (OR = 2.11; 95% CI: 1.02-4.37). The median expulsion time was reduced from 7 [5-9] days in the control group to 5 [4-7] days in the study group (p = 0.010). ROC analysis identified a 6-day threshold for stone passage (sensitivity 63.6%, specificity 72.1%, AUC = 0.627; p = 0.010). Pain intensity was significantly lower in the study group on postoperative day 1 (3 [0-4] vs. 6 [5-8] points, p < 0.001), with reduced analgesi
結構化摘要.結論: Adjunctive therapy with α1-blockers after ESWL in children with urolithiasis improves treatment efficacy, shortens stone expulsion time, reduces pain, and demonstrates a favorable safety profile. An optimal timeframe for efficacy assessment is 6 days post-ESWL.

重點文章.標題: Safety concerns associated with high-dose continuous infusion of cefepime among critically ill patients with mild renal impairment to augmented renal clearance at a level 1 trauma center: CEFTOX study.

PICO.P_族群: mild renal impairment to augmented renal clearance at a level 1 trauma center: CEFTOX study

【主要結果】were obtained ≤48 h compared to 57.4% when results were delayed >48 h (P = 0.006). These results highlight the need for early TDM and individualized dose adjustment to avoid CIN.

結構化摘要.結果: were obtained ≤48 h compared to 57.4% when results were delayed >48 h (P = 0.006). These results highlight the need for early TDM and individualized dose adjustment to avoid CIN.

可能是新興或未被充分探索的領域，可考慮：
1. 文獻回顧以了解現有證據
2. 前瞻性觀察研究
3. 與既有研究主題結合
研究想法.建議研究類型: 系統性回顧 / 前瞻性研究

研究想法.想法:
'ESKD' (臨床結局) 目前研究較少 (1 篇)，
可能是新興或未被充分探索的領域，可考慮：
1. 文獻回顧以了解現有證據
2. 前瞻性觀察研究
3. 與既有研究主題結合
研究想法.建議研究類型: 系統性回顧 / 前瞻性研究

研究想法.關鍵詞: 兒童腎臟學 + 成人腎臟學
研究想法.想法:
考慮進行兒童至成人的長期追蹤研究：
1. 兒童期腎臟疾病對成年後的影響
2. 早期介入對長期預後的效果
3. 生命歷程觀點的腎臟病研究

應用人工智慧於腎臟病研究：
1. 建立腎功能預測模型
2. 影像自動判讀系統
3. 治療反應預測
研究想法.建議研究類型: 回顧性資料分析 + 模型開發

研究想法.想法:
利用真實世界數據進行研究：
1. 健保資料庫分析
2. 電子病歷數據挖掘
3. 多中心登錄資料分析

本週有 3 篇高影響力期刊文章，可考慮：
1. 在本地族群中驗證這些發現
2. 探索可能的機轉
3. 研究是否有族群差異

研究想法.建議研究類型: 驗證性研究 / 機轉研究
